title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 09 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 09 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 09 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 3.85%.the main contract closed 812.5. The spot quotation in the morning almost kept steady.but as the disk continues to decline, some traders were decreased the price. PBF at Shandong port dealt 981 yuan/mt; decreased 10-30 yuan/mt over yesterday.
